title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India
company: Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Real Estate Agent at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India
jsonLd.description:
We at Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India:
Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shapoorji Pallonji Real Estate Capital India!
